Siganberg.Mapster.Tool 8.2.1
Copyright (c) 2020 Chaowlert Chaisrichalermpol

  mapper       (Default Verb) Generate mappers

  model        Generate models

  extension    Generate extensions

  help         Display more information on a specific command.

  version      Display version information.

result.stderr:
Siganberg.Mapster.Tool 8.2.1
Copyright (c) 2020 Chaowlert Chaisrichalermpol
USAGE:
Generate extensions:
  dotnet mapster extension mapper --assembly /Path/To/YourAssembly.dll --output
  Models

  -a, --assembly             Required. Assembly to scan

  -o, --output               (Default: Models) Output directory.

  -n, --namespace            Namespace for extensions

  -p, --printFullTypeName    Set true to print full type name

  -b, --baseNamespace        Provide base namespace to generate nested output &
                             namespace

  --help                     Display this help screen.

  --version                  Display version information.

result.stderr:
Siganberg.Mapster.Tool 8.2.1
Copyright (c) 2020 Chaowlert Chaisrichalermpol
USAGE:
Generate models:
  dotnet mapster model mapper --assembly /Path/To/YourAssembly.dll --output
  Models

  -a, --assembly             Required. Assembly to scan

  -o, --output               (Default: Models) Output directory.

  -n, --namespace            Namespace for models

  -p, --printFullTypeName    Set true to print full type name

  -r, --isRecordType         Generate record type

  -b, --baseNamespace        Provide base namespace to generate nested output &
                             namespace

  --help                     Display this help screen.

  --version                  Display version information.
